item.title: {this} Thomas Schostok @ths.nu.art The Legend. Prima causa. The reason why I ste...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

{this}
Thomas Schostok
@ths.nu.art

The Legend.
Prima causa.

The reason why I step into the beautiful world of grunge/trash graphic design before 25 years. I was searching for grunge graphic design stuff on the internet and the first and last results I got were:
{this} @ths.nu.art and
Eduardo Recife @eduardorecife_ ( this Legend is yet to come )

I was stunned when I was once on {this} website and realized that I can download all 12 issues of The Beast - {this} magazine. In PDF. In 2001. Free. It's still there.

As for me The Beast was and still is Encyclopedia of grunge/trash graphic design.

At the beginning it was the Beast.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram

@46pgs

{this}
Thomas Schostok
@ths.nu.art

The Legend.
Prima causa.

The reason why I step into the beautiful world of grunge/trash graphic design before 25 years. I was searching for grunge graphic design stuff on the internet and the first and last results I got were:
{this} @ths.nu.art and
Eduardo Recife @eduardorecife_ ( this Legend is yet to come )

I was stunned when I was once on {this} website and realized that I can download all 12 issues of The Beast - {this} magazine. In PDF. In 2001. Free. It's still there.

As for me The Beast was and still is Encyclopedia of grunge/trash graphic design.

At the beginning it was the Beast.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Very interesting new graphic design discovery which fit so well in our style.

Studio’s account :@yks.hkn
Yuno Kay’s account: @medianblending

Check it. Very inspirational and different. Which is good.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

item.author: 46pgs

item.title: Just read for I don't know how many times the best book about graphic design : R...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Just read for I don't know how many times the best book about graphic design : Raygun: Out of Control

Here is details from DPS of the mentioned book and taken until DPS 66/67. Amazing, inspiring, motivating, best design which I ever saw in the book. By far the BEST BOOK ABOUT GRAPHIC DESIGN which we love and care for.

If you don't have it - get it !

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram

🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Just read for I don't know how many times the best book about graphic design : Raygun: Out of Control

Here is details from DPS of the mentioned book and taken until DPS 66/67. Amazing, inspiring, motivating, best design which I ever saw in the book. By far the BEST BOOK ABOUT GRAPHIC DESIGN which we love and care for.

If you don't have it - get it !

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

item.author: 46pgs

item.title: Scot Morgan @morgan5210 is a grunge graphic designer who we already presented bu...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Scot Morgan @morgan5210 is a grunge graphic designer who we already presented but I simply love his works so much that I have to post his new stuff. Scott use hard sepia use which I admire and often use in my own works, old notebooks grids, handwriting, pics and when he use new (age) materials his works still kept sepia and on those artworks (like on 2nd one in posted works above) he use typo and other elements which are usually used in works like this but sepia is element which is over-present in all his works. And I LOVE IT.

Check Scott's amazing works in his feed at @morgan5210

P.S. also his avatar is pic of col. Kurtz - Marlon Brando in Apocalypse Now which monologues in the same movie are the biggest inspiration for my artistic expression.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Scot Morgan @morgan5210 is a grunge graphic designer who we already presented but I simply love his works so much that I have to post his new stuff. Scott use hard sepia use which I admire and often use in my own works, old notebooks grids, handwriting, pics and when he use new (age) materials his works still kept sepia and on those artworks (like on 2nd one in posted works above) he use typo and other elements which are usually used in works like this but sepia is element which is over-present in all his works. And I LOVE IT.

Check Scott's amazing works in his feed at @morgan5210

P.S. also his avatar is pic of col. Kurtz - Marlon Brando in Apocalypse Now which monologues in the same movie are the biggest inspiration for my artistic expression.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: 46pgs

item.title: Another beautiful grunge series of stunning artworks by Dave Eccles @spenika1 We...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Another beautiful grunge series of stunning artworks by Dave Eccles @spenika1
We already present you this amazing designer but looking last night at his feed again I simply must make another post about this great designer and shift your attention to this guy and his works. I love this kind of compositions of graphic elements and use of typography and I use it almost all the time, but Dave is far far away from me in most positive sense in benefit of @spenika1

I am a publisher, editor, I don't know how you in the USA and UK call the guy who brings materials on the table and said we will make magazine issues out of this material in this way? What do you call this person? What is this person's official title?

Please answer me on my question and, of course, enjoy, Dave's second wave of grunge graphic design greatness.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Another beautiful grunge series of stunning artworks by Dave Eccles @spenika1
We already present you this amazing designer but looking last night at his feed again I simply must make another post about this great designer and shift your attention to this guy and his works. I love this kind of compositions of graphic elements and use of typography and I use it almost all the time, but Dave is far far away from me in most positive sense in benefit of @spenika1

I am a publisher, editor, I don't know how you in the USA and UK call the guy who brings materials on the table and said we will make magazine issues out of this material in this way? What do you call this person? What is this person's official title?

Please answer me on my question and, of course, enjoy, Dave's second wave of grunge graphic design greatness.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs
